snapshot.baseline_status: clean, working tree matched HEAD at launch

lead.workflow: true UltraCode dynamic fanout (lead + two adversarial phases)

inventory_coverage.coverage_statement: Full tracked-repository coverage. All 22 tracked files were read by the lead and/or scouts; the safety-claims scout and roadmap scout each confirmed full 22-file reads; the skeptic-verifier re-read every cited file:line.

checks_run.detail: seed idempotent; 3 verdicts as expected; operator action persisted; audit appended 6->7; evidence boundary verified
term1=0 term2=0 term3=0 term4=0 term5=0 term6=0 across all six retired terms

verdict.biggest_upside: A specific, non-generic control moment (block/hold an unsafe tokenized endpoint while preserving a valid fiat fallback and emitting evidence) modeled coherently across doc, UI, schema, and evidence export, with test-enforced claim discipline.
verdict.biggest_risk: No decision logic exists; checks and verdicts are hardcoded fixtures. Around that gap: no CRUD, cosmetic four-eyes, no auth, no tenancy, no tamper-evident audit, no live data. The ~1,150-line shape is easy to copy.
verdict.adversarial_dissent: product-redteam returned PIVOT (toward observe-only Shape C / advisory) with STOP for Shape A as a live blocking gate as-is; honored via advisory-first sequencing and by making the rule engine the next gate.
verdict.next_move: Build a deterministic rule evaluator that computes the three existing verdicts from endpoint field values, keeping everything synthetic and localhost.

selected_shape.name: internal pre-release endpoint control gate
selected_shape.entry_posture: advisory-mode-first (observe/log, no auto-block) before any enforcement

rejected.name: shared cross-counterparty endpoint registry
rejected.reason: two-sided cold-start; no tenancy in schema; sells the currently-disclaimed verified-evidence claim

rejected.name: observe-only audit/policy-simulation layer
rejected.reason: rejected as destination (dilutes namesake block value, same integration lift, audit not tamper-evident) but adopted as the advisory on-ramp for A

requirements.R0: govern endpoint profiles as first-class multi-instance records
requirements.R1: pre-release validation checks computed from field state
requirements.R7: integration seams to real data sources

findings.finding: No policy/decision engine; checks and verdicts are hardcoded fixtures, never computed
No endpoint CRUD; one shared endpoint_id=1; status columns literal scenario_driven
Four-eyes is cosmetic; server never checks actor identity; actor is forgeable client text
No authentication on any route; localhost enforced only by a startup SystemExit guard
route_decisions.scenario_id is UNIQUE; schema cannot store decision history/recomputation
Persisted operator actions never change decision/checks; no UPDATE/DELETE in app.py
Stored-injection: unsanitized action_type rendered via unescaped innerHTML; CSP unsafe-inline does not mitigate
CSRF-reachable write: no Origin/CSRF check; body parsed as JSON regardless of Content-Type (text/plain bypass)
Audit trail not tamper-evident; append-only only by absence of mutating routes
No schema migration; seed destructively deletes and rebuilds the DB every run
No tenant_id/org scoping anywhere in the schema
No CI; mandatory verification commands never auto-enforced
Evidence receipt id is scenario-invariant; receipt download uses a fixed filename
hold_payment action exists server-side but has no UI control
source_manifest DB table is seeded but never queried; reference-manifest API is file-backed
do_POST catches only JSON/sqlite errors; a non-dict JSON body or non-numeric Content-Length crashes uncaught
Claim discipline is real and test-enforced; no overclaim in shipped prose; STATIC_QA PASS

value_hypotheses.label: misdirected tokenized-settlement prevention
value_hypotheses.metric: count/value of token instructions caught pre-release with stale/incomplete evidence

value_hypotheses.label: fiat-fallback continuity
value_hypotheses.metric: percent of blocked token routes settling same value-date via fallback; time-to-fallback

value_hypotheses.label: audit-preparation effort reduction
value_hypotheses.metric: hours to assemble an audit packet per exception

recommended_next_gate.name: Compute the verdict
recommended_next_gate.scope: In demo-db/ only, replace hardcoded per-scenario decision/check fixtures with a deterministic rule evaluator deriving all three existing verdicts from settlement-endpoint, authority, allowlist, and payload field values.
recommended_next_gate.acceptance_evidence: Extended smoke asserts 5/5 correct computed verdicts: three existing scenarios reproduced (regression vs smoke.py:30-34) plus two new synthetic edge cases (missing fallback; simultaneous expired allowlist + authority). Paired cheap demand test: >=3 payment/treasury-ops contacts answer how many of the six checks they already cover.
closed_side_effect_gates_preserved: no hosted deployment, migration, service restart, or public exposure

raf_decision_box: Advisory vs blocking liability appetite (decides whether destination is Shape A or a permanent observe-only posture)
Wedge future: internal gate as end state vs beachhead toward a cross-counterparty registry
Which check becomes real/live-fed first (wallet-allowlist-freshness vs authority-evidence)
First design-partner profile: originating bank vs custodian vs creditor/fallback-SSI holder
Build vs partner for verification adapters (LEI/vLEI, custody, screening) — main lever on defensibility
limitations: Read-only review of a frozen snapshot; no code was changed and no production system was touched.
qa_browser_mobile.py was not executed (requires Playwright/Chromium, out of scope); its coverage was assessed by reading only.
Market, buyer, pricing, competitor, and regulatory statements are hypotheses; the repository contains no customers, prices, interviews, or telemetry.
Concurrency/SQLite-locking behavior was reasoned from code, not exercised under load.

The skeptic-verifier issued read-only sqlite queries against a pre-existing untracked demo-db/data/demo.sqlite; it did not seed or serve. That artifact is gitignored and was removed before final reconciliation.
Agent model identity is established via each agent's self-reported model id plus the configured topology, not via an external attestation service.

closed_gates_preserved: no application code, existing docs, tests, configs, CI, package files, or git metadata edited
no live provider or production data access
no vault or unrelated repositories read
no Claude/project memory or agent notes written
no publication or Kanban work created
side_effect_reconciliation.expected_final_git_status: only the two authorized untracked artifacts under docs/product-shaping/
